etymology.description: 毛澤東思想 refers to the political and theoretical concepts developed by 毛澤東(毛泽东) (Máo Zédōng, 'Mao Zedong'), the founding father of the People's Republic of China. It combines 毛澤東(毛泽东), his name, and 思想(思想), which means 'thought' or 'ideology'. The full term signifies the body of political, military, and economic ideas attributed to Mao.
etymology.interpretation: 毛澤東(毛泽东) (Máo Zédōng, 'Mao Zedong') combined with 思想(思想) (sīxiǎng, 'thought') forms 毛泽东思想 (Mao Zedong Thought), reflecting a comprehensive ideological framework. 'Mao Zedong' indicates the originator, while 'thought' represents the abstract political and philosophical ideas developed under his guidance. The ideology forms the basis of Maoism, influencing Chinese politics and global movements.

examples.chinese: 毛泽东思想(毛澤東思想)是中国革命的指导思想。
examples.pinyin: Máo Zédōng Sīxiǎng shì Zhōngguó gémìng de zhǐdǎo sīxiǎng.
examples.english: Mao Zedong Thought is the guiding ideology of the Chinese revolution.

examples.chinese: 许多学者研究毛泽东思想的影响(許多學者研究毛澤東思想的影響)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō xuézhě yánjiū Máo Zédōng Sīxiǎng de yǐngxiǎng.
examples.english: Many scholars study the impact of Mao Zedong Thought.

examples.chinese: 毛泽东思想(毛澤東思想)在中国历史上具有重要地位。
examples.pinyin: Máo Zédōng Sīxiǎng zài Zhōngguó lìshǐ shàng jùyǒu zhòngyào dìwèi.
examples.english: Mao Zedong Thought holds an important place in Chinese history.
